case_title: ANDREW JAMES WHITE VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, ANDREW JAMES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PARTIES TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE TO MAR-06-2023 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANDREW JAMES WHITE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MANUEL DIAZ III, DIRECTOR OF QA AND IMPROVEMENT. PLAINTIFF ANDREW JAMES WHITE REQUESTS IN COURT FOR CONTINUANCE DUE TO PENDING OUTCOME OF INSURANCE AND TO SUBPOENA A PARTY. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST OF CONTINUANCE WAS DENIED BY THE COURT. THE COURT ORDERS CASE CONTINUED TO MAR-06, 2023 @5:30 P.M. FOR PARTIES TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE. PLAINTIFF MAY USE THE TIME TO GATHER ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE, THE TRIAL WILL MOVE FORWARD ON THE NEXT COURT DATE WITH OR WITHOUT OUTCOME OF THE INSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; DEPUTY TAUSCHER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MANUEL DIAZ III, DIRECTOR OF QUALITY ASSURANCE AND IMPROVEMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAIVED $40. SERVED DEC-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE FEB-14-23 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC (ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIANT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY WHITE, ANDREW JAMES TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PARTIES TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANDREW JAMES WHITE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MANUEL DIAZ III, DIRECTOR OF QA AND IMPROVEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: PANG LY; DEPUTY RON. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
